system.effect: The psyker reaches into the target's mind and erases specific memories. The psyker can erase up to Psy Rating hours of memory from the target. The target is unaware that memories have been removed.

description.value: The psyker delves into the target's mind and carefully excises specific memories, leaving no trace of their removal. The psyker can erase up to Psy Rating hours of continuous memory from the target's mind. The target is completely unaware that any memories have been removed and may confabulate to fill the gaps. For every 10 points by which the Focus Power test is passed, the psyker may erase an additional Psy Rating hours of memory.
